name: SWK Holdings Corp
summary: SWK Holdings Corporation is a specialty finance and asset management company focused on healthcare and life sciences. Through its Finance Receivables segment, it provides customized financing solutions including royalty purchases, synthetic revenue interests, and secured debt to life science companies, institutions, and inventors. The company previously operated a Pharmaceutical Development segment (MOD3 Pharma/Enteris BioPharma) providing drug development, formulation, and manufacturing services, which was sold in Q3 2025. Headquartered in Dallas, Texas, SWK targets sub-$50 million transactions in biotechnology, medical devices, diagnostics, animal health, and pharmaceuticals.

products.name: Royalty Purchase Financing
products.description: Capital provided in exchange for interests in existing royalty revenue streams from life science products.

products.name: Synthetic Revenue Interests
products.description: Creation of synthetic revenue interests in commercialized life science products.

products.name: Secured Debt Investments
products.description: Senior and subordinated debt financing to life science companies, sometimes including warrants or equity features.

products.name: Pharmaceutical Development Services (MOD3 Pharma)
products.description: Clinical development, formulation, and manufacturing services for pharmaceutical partners; assets sold Q3 2025.

partnerships.description: Previously partnered with investment advisory clients to co-invest in transactions exceeding $25 million; no current active partnerships.
